---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: AmaLS367
---

## Summary

A clear one-sentence summary of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? How does it fit the **Shadow → Demo → Tiny Real → Controlled Scale** philosophy?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the implementation you have in mind. Include relevant modules (`backend/`, strategy names, API endpoints, etc.).

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] Backtest gate passes (if strategy-related)

## Additional Context

Attach any relevant research, charts, or references.
